sentence: The meeting was _____ because the manager suddenly got sick this morning.
explanation: call off 指取消。經理臨時生病，會議被取消，故選 called off；put on 是穿上、looked up 是查閱，語意都不合。

sentence: I have been waiting _____ the bus stop for almost half an hour.
explanation: 表示在某個定點用介系詞 at。at the bus stop 指在公車站等車，故選 at。

sentence: Don't be too hard on yourself; everyone makes mistakes _____ .
explanation: once in a while 指偶爾。人人偶爾都會犯錯，故選 A；on time 是準時、by the way 是順帶一提，語意不合。

sentence: She promised to _____ her little brother while their parents were out shopping.
explanation: look after 指照顧。父母外出購物時她答應照顧弟弟，故選 look after；look for 是尋找、look out 是小心。

sentence: All the students are looking forward _____ the summer vacation next month.
explanation: look forward to 是固定搭配，to 後接名詞或動名詞，表示期待。故選 to。

sentence: The test had a few tricky parts, but _____ , I think I did pretty well.
explanation: on the whole 指整體而言。雖有難題，但整體表現不錯，故選 B；out of order 是故障，語意不合。

sentence: Please _____ your shoes before you come into the house.
explanation: take off 指脫下。進屋前要脫鞋，故選 take off；take after 是長得像、take over 是接管。

sentence: My sister is really good _____ playing the violin; she practices every single day.
explanation: be good at 指擅長，後接技能或活動。故選 at。

sentence: I ran as fast as I could and reached the platform _____ to catch the last train.
explanation: just in time 指及時、剛好趕上。拼命跑剛好趕上末班車，故選 C。

sentence: Our team will never _____ , even when we are losing by a lot.
explanation: give up 指放棄。即使大幅落後也不放棄，故選 give up；give back 是歸還、give away 是贈送。

sentence: This nature book is divided _____ five parts, each about a different kind of animal.
explanation: be divided into 指被分成，搭配 into 表示分成幾個部分。故選 into。

sentence: We didn't plan to meet, but we ran _____ each other at the busy night market.
explanation: run into 指偶然遇見。沒約卻在夜市巧遇，故選 into；run after 是追趕、run over 是輾過。

sentence: My birthday is _____ March.
explanation: 「in + 月份」表示某月份，故用 in March。

sentence: We don't have school _____ Saturday and Sunday.
explanation: 「on + 星期」表示星期幾，故用 on Saturday and Sunday。

sentence: The train leaves _____ six o'clock sharp.
explanation: 「at + 精確時刻」表示明確時間點，故用 at six o'clock。

sentence: There are twenty students _____ my classroom.
explanation: 「in + 封閉空間」表示教室裡面，故用 in my classroom。

sentence: Please put your bag _____ the table.
explanation: 「on + 表面」表示放在桌面上，故用 on the table。

sentence: It's dark in here; please _____ the light.
explanation: 房間很暗，要「打開」燈，故選 turn on。

sentence: Remember to _____ the TV before you go to bed.
explanation: 睡覺前要「關掉」電視，故選 turn off。

sentence: I usually _____ at six thirty every morning.
explanation: 描述每天早上「起床」的習慣，故選 get up。

sentence: Please _____ and make yourself comfortable.
explanation: 請對方「坐下」放輕鬆，故選 sit down。

sentence: When the teacher entered, all the students _____ to say hello.
explanation: 老師進來時全班「站起來」打招呼，故選 stood up。

sentence: I usually _____ at seven without an alarm clock.
explanation: 沒有鬧鐘也能自然「醒來」，故選 wake up。

sentence: Let's meet _____ the bus stop after school.
explanation: 「at + 定點」表示在公車站這個點，故用 at the bus stop。

sentence: My cousin lives _____ Taipei.
explanation: 「in + 城市」表示在台北市內，故用 in Taipei。

sentence: It's cold outside, so _____ your coat before you leave.
explanation: 天冷出門前要「穿上」外套，故選 put on。

sentence: Please _____ your room before dinner.
explanation: 晚餐前要把房間「整理乾淨」，故選 clean up。

sentence: "Can I borrow your pen?" "_____! Here you are."
explanation: 回應請求時表示「當然可以」，故選 Of course。

sentence: Some fruits, _____ apples and bananas, are good for your health.
explanation: 舉出蘋果、香蕉作為例子，故用 for example。

sentence: I'm _____ my glasses; have you seen them?
explanation: 正在「尋找」不見的眼鏡，故選 looking for。

sentence: Please _____ the blackboard while I explain this problem.
explanation: 上課時請大家「看」黑板，故選 look at。

sentence: We had to _____ the bus for almost thirty minutes.
explanation: 公車遲到，只好「等待」公車，故選 wait for。

sentence: Do you often _____ music while doing your homework?
explanation: 詢問是否常邊寫作業邊「聽」音樂，故選 listen to。

sentence: Whether we go hiking tomorrow will _____ the weather.
explanation: 是否去健行「取決於」天氣，故選 depend on。

sentence: This old bicycle used to _____ my grandfather.
explanation: 這台舊腳踏車以前「屬於」爺爺，故選 belong to。

sentence: I don't _____ your opinion about the new rule.
explanation: 表達不「同意」對方的意見，故選 agree with。

sentence: She has lived in this city _____ 2015.
explanation: 「since + 明確年份」表示從那時開始至今，故用 since 2015。

sentence: They have been married _____ ten years.
explanation: 「for + 一段時間」表示持續的時間長度，故用 for ten years。

sentence: Please turn off your phone _____ the movie.
explanation: 「during + 特定期間」表示在電影播放的那段期間，故用 during the movie。

sentence: After months of hard work, she _____ finished her novel.
explanation: 經過數月努力「終於」完成小說，故用 at last。

sentence: He looks calm, but _____, he is very nervous inside.
explanation: 外表看起來平靜，但「事實上」內心緊張，故用 in fact。

sentence: I didn't break the vase _____; it was an accident.
explanation: 句中的 didn't...on purpose 表示不是故意打破花瓶，是意外，故用 on purpose。

sentence: Don't forget to _____ your homework before Friday.
explanation: 提醒星期五前要「繳交」作業，故選 hand in。

sentence: The detective worked hard to _____ who had stolen the jewelry.
explanation: 偵探努力「查明」是誰偷走珠寶，故選 find out。

sentence: My new roommate and I _____ very well with each other.
explanation: 形容和新室友「相處」融洽，故選 get along。

sentence: She always solves problems calmly and _____ patience.
explanation: 「with + 特質」表示帶著耐心解決問題，故用 with patience。

sentence: Could you _____ some milk on your way home?
explanation: 回家路上「順便買」一些牛奶，故選 pick up。

sentence: Please _____ your toys before your friends come over.
explanation: 朋友來之前要把玩具「收好」，故選 put away。

sentence: It took her a while, but she finally managed to _____ the math problem.
explanation: 花了一些時間終於「解出」數學題，故選 work out。

sentence: The volunteers helped _____ the tents before the festival began.
explanation: 志工協助在慶典前「搭建」帳篷，故選 set up。

sentence: The teacher kindly _____ the mistakes in my essay.
explanation: 老師好心「指出」作文中的錯誤，故選 pointed out。

sentence: She woke up early _____ catch the first train.
explanation: 早起是「為了」趕搭第一班火車，故用 in order to。

sentence: He didn't study at all; _____, he failed the test.
explanation: 完全沒讀書，「結果」考試不及格，故用 as a result。

sentence: The flight arrived exactly _____ , which surprised everyone.
explanation: 班機準時抵達讓大家驚訝，故用 on time（準時，強調不早不晚）。

sentence: I didn't mean to delete the file; it happened _____.
explanation: 不是故意刪除檔案，是「意外」發生的，故用 by accident。

sentence: The manager asked the workers to stop the machine _____ .
explanation: 經理要求工人「立刻」停下機器，故用 at once。

sentence: She didn't tell us she was coming, but she suddenly _____ at the party.
explanation: turn up 指出現、意外到來。沒說會來卻突然出現在派對，故選 turned up。

sentence: The thief was forced to _____ all the stolen money to the police.
explanation: 小偷被迫把偷來的錢「交出」給警察，故選 hand over。

sentence: Everyone says that Lily _____ her mother in both looks and personality.
explanation: 大家都說 Lily 長相和個性都「像」她媽媽，故選 takes after。

sentence: It's never easy to _____ such a difficult time alone.
explanation: 獨自「經歷」困難的時期並不容易，故選 go through。

sentence: _____ the heavy rain, the game continued as scheduled.
explanation: 「Despite + 名詞」表示儘管下大雨比賽仍照常進行，故用 Despite。

sentence: You should never drive _____ wearing a seatbelt.
explanation: 開車時不應該「沒有」繫安全帶，故用 without。

sentence: You need to book your train ticket at least a week _____ .
explanation: 訂火車票至少要「提前」一週，故用 in advance。

sentence: We are all _____ the summer vacation next month.
explanation: 大家都很「期待」下個月的暑假，故選 looking forward to。

sentence: It took him months to _____ the loss of his beloved dog.
explanation: 花了好幾個月才「走出」失去愛犬的悲傷，故選 get over。

sentence: The new manager soon _____ strong resistance from the staff.
explanation: 新經理很快就「遭遇」員工強烈的抵制，故選 came up against。

sentence: Many young players _____ this legendary basketball star.
explanation: 許多年輕球員都「景仰」這位傳奇球星，故選 look up to。

sentence: It's not polite to _____ people just because they are poor.
explanation: 不應該因為貧窮就「看不起」別人，故選 look down on。

sentence: _____ , students in this school perform very well in English.
explanation: 「整體來說」這所學校的學生英文表現很好，故用 In general。

sentence: Some countries, _____ Japan and Korea, have very strict recycling rules.
explanation: 舉日本和韓國作為例子，故用 for instance。

sentence: She is, _____, the best singer in our school.
explanation: 「毫無疑問」她是學校裡最棒的歌手，故用 without doubt。

sentence: He isn't lazy at all; _____ , he works harder than anyone else.
explanation: 他一點都不懶惰，「相反地」比任何人都努力，故用 on the contrary。

sentence: _____ his young age, he speaks three languages fluently.
explanation: 「儘管」年紀小卻能流利說三種語言，故用 In spite of。

sentence: She decided to walk to work _____ taking the bus.
explanation: 決定走路上班「而不是」搭公車，故用 instead of。

sentence: You can always _____ your best friend in times of trouble.
explanation: 遇到困難時總能「依靠」最好的朋友，故選 count on。

sentence: It's not easy to _____ such a difficult customer.
explanation: 「應付」難搞的顧客並不容易，故選 deal with。

sentence: He worked overtime all week to _____ the days he had missed.
explanation: 加班一整週來「彌補」錯過的天數，故選 make up for。

sentence: During the holiday, I finally had time to _____ some sleep.
explanation: 假期終於有時間「補足」睡眠，故選 catch up on。

sentence: _____ the weather report, it will snow this weekend.
explanation: 「根據」氣象報告這週末會下雪，故用 According to。

sentence: The flight was delayed _____ the heavy fog.
explanation: 班機「由於」濃霧而延誤，故用 owing to。

sentence: The heavy traffic can partly _____ why he arrived so late.
explanation: 塞車可以部分「解釋」他為何遲到，故選 account for。

sentence: Jenny stayed home today because she _____ a bad cold.
explanation: Jenny 今天請假在家是因為她「染上」重感冒，故選 came down with。

sentence: The new manager decided to _____ the old, inefficient system completely.
explanation: 新經理決定完全「廢除」舊有沒效率的制度，故選 do away with。

sentence: If you skip too many classes, you will soon _____ in your studies.
explanation: 翹太多課很快就會「落後」課業，故選 fall behind。

sentence: The new movie failed to _____ the audience's high expectations.
explanation: 新電影未能「達到」觀眾很高的期待，故選 live up to。

sentence: A true friend will always _____ you when others speak badly of you.
explanation: 真正的朋友總會在別人說壞話時「挺身支持」你，故選 stand up for。

sentence: The doctors could not completely _____ the possibility of a serious illness.
explanation: 醫生無法完全「排除」罹患重病的可能性，故選 rule out。

sentence: I'm sorry, but I'm _____ with a meeting until three o'clock.
explanation: 因為開會到三點都「抽不開身」，故選 tied up。

sentence: Eating healthy food may seem boring now, but it pays off _____ .
explanation: 健康飲食現在看似無聊，但「長遠來看」值得，故用 in the long run。

sentence: I'm not sure if he will come, but _____ , we should prepare enough food.
explanation: 不確定他是否會來，但「無論如何」該準備足夠食物，故用 at any rate。

sentence: We don't have a permanent office yet, so we are working from home _____ .
explanation: 還沒有固定辦公室，「暫時」在家工作，故用 for the time being。

sentence: _____ , I should have listened to my parents' advice about the investment.
explanation: 「回想起來」早該聽父母對投資的建議，故用 In retrospect。

sentence: She tried hard to _____ her tears during the sad movie.
explanation: 她努力「忍住」在悲傷電影中的淚水，故選 hold back。

sentence: The effect of the painkiller will _____ after a few hours.
explanation: 止痛藥的效果幾小時後會「逐漸消退」，故選 wear off。

sentence: You should always _____ your important files in case your computer crashes.
explanation: 應該隨時「備份」重要檔案以防電腦當機，故選 back up。

sentence: Before the trip to France, I want to _____ my French.
explanation: 去法國前想「複習」法文，故選 brush up on。

sentence: The firefighters arrived _____ to save the family trapped inside.
explanation: 消防隊「在最後一刻」趕到救出受困家庭，故用 in the nick of time。

sentence: _____ , the small team managed to win the national championship.
explanation: 「儘管困難重重」小隊仍贏得全國冠軍，故用 Against all odds。

sentence: _____ , the new policy has been well received by the public.
explanation: 「整體而言」新政策獲得大眾好評，故用 By and large。

sentence: Parents often make sacrifices _____ their children's future.
explanation: 父母常「為了」孩子的未來做出犧牲，故用 for the sake of。

sentence: _____ , the students were thrilled when the exam was canceled.
explanation: 「不用說」也知道考試取消時學生們超興奮，故用 Needless to say。

sentence: He goes jogging every morning _____ .
explanation: 他每天早上「不論晴雨」都去慢跑，故用 come rain or shine。

sentence: Your application has been received, and you will hear from us _____ .
explanation: 申請已收到，「日後」會通知結果，故用 in due course。

sentence: My little brother cries _____ ; the smallest thing can upset him.
options: (A) in the blink of an eye
(D) at the drop of a hat
explanation: 弟弟「動不動」就哭，一點小事就能讓他難過，故用 at the drop of a hat。

sentence: After years of silence, she called me _____ last night.
options: (D) at the drop of a hat
explanation: 多年沉默後她昨晚「毫無預警地」打電話給我，故用 out of the blue。

sentence: The accident happened _____ ; no one had time to react.
options: (A) at the drop of a hat
(B) in the blink of an eye
explanation: 意外發生「在一瞬間」，沒人來得及反應，故用 in the blink of an eye。

sentence: A loyal friend will stand by you _____ .
explanation: 忠實的朋友會「不論好壞」都陪伴你，故用 through thick and thin。

sentence: After being cheated once, he never trusted strangers again; _____ , as they say.
explanation: 被騙過一次後他再也不信任陌生人，正所謂「一朝被蛇咬十年怕草繩」，故用 once bitten, twice shy。
optionsZh: 一朝被蛇咬十年怕草繩

sentence: _____ math, my sister is much better than I am.
explanation: 「說到」數學，我妹妹比我厲害得多，故用 When it comes to。

sentence: She didn't tell anyone about the accident _____ getting into trouble.
explanation: 她沒告訴任何人意外的事，是「因為害怕」惹上麻煩，故用 for fear of。

sentence: All the students passed the test _____ one who was absent that day.
explanation: 全班都通過測驗，「除了」當天缺席的那位同學，故用 with the exception of。

sentence: _____ , the project is complete; only a final review remains.
explanation: 「基本上／實際上」專案已經完成，只剩最後審查，故用 For all intents and purposes。
